节点.功能描述: Arrow object.
Is show the arrow background or not.
When the indicator show, set the arrow position is side of the indicator or in the middle of content area. The arrow is displayed on side of the indicator, if the value is false.
The arrow background size. The size of the arrow is three-quarters of the background size, when the background is displayed.
注释信息: @default When isSidebarMiddle is false, the default value is 24vp, Otherwise,the default value is 32vp

节点.功能描述: The arrow background background color.
注释信息: @default When isSidebarMiddle is false, the default value is #00000000, Otherwise, the default value is #19182431

节点.功能描述: The arrow size. The arrow size can be set, when the background is not displayed. The size of the arrow is three-quarters of the background size, when the background is displayed.
注释信息: @default When isSidebarMiddle is false, the default value is 18vp, Otherwise, the default value is 24vp

Offset of the current page to the start position of the swiper main axis. The unit is vp.

Defines the properties for controlling the autoplay behavior.
Whether the autoplay stops immediately when the component is touched.
Swiper nested scroll nested mode
The scrolling is contained within the Swiper component, and no scroll chaining occurs, that is, the parent container does not scroll when the component scrolling reaches the boundary.
The Swiper component scrolls first, and when it hits the boundary, the parent container scrolls.
Declare the animation mode of SwiperController's changeIndex method.
Jump to target index without animation.
Scroll to target index with animation.
Jump to some index near the target index without animation, then scroll to target index with animation.

Sets the index of the child component currently displayed in the container. If the value is less than 0 or greater than or equal to the number of child components, the default value 0 is used.

parameters.说明: Index of the child component currently displayed in the container. Default value is 0.

节点.功能描述:
Sets whether to enable automatic playback for child component switching.

NOTE:
If loop is set to false, the playback stops when the last page is reached.
The playback continues when the page is not the last page after a swipe gesture.
If the Swiper component becomes invisible, the playback stops.

Default value is false.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether to enable automatic playback for child component switching.

parameters.说明: Whether to enable automatic playback for child component switching.

节点.功能描述:
Sets whether child components automatically play when the screen is pressed by fingers, a mouse device, or other input devices.

NOTE:
If loop is set to false, the playback stops when the last page is reached.
The playback continues when the page is not the last page after a swipe gesture.
If the Swiper component becomes invisible, the playback stops.

Default value is false. a mouse device, or other input devices. Default value is { stopWhenTouched: true }.
注释信息: @param { boolean } autoPlay - Whether to enable automatic playback for child component switching.
@param { AutoPlayOptions } options - Whether child components stop autoplay when the screen is pressed by fingers,

parameters.说明: Whether to enable automatic playback for child component switching.
Whether child components stop autoplay when the screen is pressed by fingers,

注释信息: @param { number } value - Interval for automatic playback. Default value is 3000, the unit is ms.

parameters.说明: Interval for automatic playback. Default value is 3000, the unit is ms.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the space between child components.

NOTE:
If the type is number, the default unit is vp.
If the type is string, the pixel unit must be explicitly specified, for example, '10px'; if the unit is not specified, for example, '10', the default unit vp is used.

Minimum value is 0. If a value less than 0 is set, the default value is used.
注释信息: @param { number | string } value - Space between child components. Default value is 0,

parameters.说明: Space between child components. Default value is 0,

parameters.说明: Mode in which elements are displayed along the main axis.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the number of child components to be preloaded(cached).

NOTE:
Which are needed for the specific number of pages immediately before and after the current page.
If swipeByGroup in displayCount is set to true, child components are cached by group.

Minimum value is 0. If a value less than 0 is set, the default value is used.
注释信息: @param { number } value - Number of child components to be preloaded (cached). Default value is 1.

parameters.说明: Number of child components to be preloaded (cached). Default value is 1.

节点.功能描述: Sets the number of child components to be preloaded(cached). Minimum value is 0. If a value less than 0 is set, the default value is used. without being added to the render tree. Default value is false.
注释信息: @param { number } count - Number of child components to be preloaded (cached).Default value is 1.
@param { boolean } isShown - Whether the cached nodes within the range rendered
@returns { SwiperAttribute } the attribute of the swiper.

parameters.说明: Number of child components to be preloaded (cached).Default value is 1.
Whether the cached nodes within the range rendered

节点.功能描述: Sets the number of elements to display per page. If swipeByGroup is set to true: 1、All sub-items are grouped from index 0. 2、The number of sub-items in each group is the value of displayCount. 3、If the number of sub-items in the last group is less than displayCount, placeholder items are added to supplement the number of last group. 4、Placeholder items do not display any content and are only used as placeholders. 5、When turning pages, turn pages by group.
注释信息: @param { number | string | SwiperAutoFill } value - Number of elements to display per page. Default value is 1.
@param { boolean } [swipeByGroup] - Whether to turn pages by group. Default value is false.

parameters.说明: Number of elements to display per page. Default value is 1.
boolean } [swipeByGroup] - Whether to turn pages by group. Default value is false.

节点.功能描述: Setting indicator style navigation.

Sets the previous margin, used to reveal a small part of the previous item. When the previous item is empty, do not display blank space.

NOTE:
This attribute is effective only when the layout mode of the child components in Swiper is set to stretch, which mainly includes two scenarios: 1. displayMode is set to SwiperDisplayMode.STRETCH; 2. displayCount is assigned a numeric value.
When the main axis runs horizontally and either the next margin or previous margin is greater than the measured width of the child component, neither the next margin nor previous margin is displayed.
When the main axis runs vertically and either the next margin or previous margin is greater than the measured height of the child component, neither the next margin nor previous margin is displayed.

Default value is 0. Default value is false.
注释信息: @param { Length } value - The length of previous margin.This attribute cannot be set in percentage.
@param { boolean } [ignoreBlank] - Whether to hide(ignore) the previous margin on the first page in non-loop scenarios.
@returns { SwiperAttribute } The attribute of the swiper.

parameters.说明: The length of previous margin.This attribute cannot be set in percentage.
boolean } [ignoreBlank] - Whether to hide(ignore) the previous margin on the first page in non-loop scenarios.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the next margin, used to reveal a small part of the next item. When the next item is empty, do not display blank space.

NOTE:
This attribute is effective only when the layout mode of the child components in Swiper is set to stretch, which mainly includes two scenarios: 1. displayMode is set to SwiperDisplayMode.STRETCH; 2. displayCount is assigned a numeric value.
When the main axis runs horizontally and either the next margin or previous margin is greater than the measured width of the child component, neither the next margin nor previous margin is displayed.
When the main axis runs vertically and either the next margin or previous margin is greater than the measured height of the child component, neither the next margin nor previous margin is displayed.

Default value is 0. Default value is false.
注释信息: @param { Length } value - The length of next margin. This attribute cannot be set in percentage.
@param { boolean } [ignoreBlank] - Whether to hide(ignore) the next margin on the last page in non-loop scenarios.
@returns { SwiperAttribute } The attribute of the swiper.

parameters.说明: The length of next margin. This attribute cannot be set in percentage.
boolean } [ignoreBlank] - Whether to hide(ignore) the next margin on the last page in non-loop scenarios.

Triggered when the switching animation ends. Anonymous Object Rectification
Triggered on a frame-by-frame basis when the page is turned by a swipe. Anonymous Object Rectification

Sets the nested scrolling mode of the Swiper component and its parent container.

NOTE:
When loop is set to true, the Swiper component has no edge effect and does not trigger nested scrolling of its parent container.

Default value is SwiperNestedScrollMode.SELF_ONLY.
注释信息: @param { SwiperNestedScrollMode } value - mode for nested scrolling.
@returns { SwiperAttribute } the attribute of the swiper.

parameters.说明: mode for nested scrolling.

节点.功能描述:
Defines a custom switching animation.

NOTE:
1. This API does not work when prevMargin and nextMargin are set in such a way that the Swiper frontend and backend display the same page during loop playback.
2. During page scrolling, the ContentDidScrollCallback callback is invoked for all pages in the viewport on a frame-by-frame basis.
3. When the swipeByGroup parameter of the displayCount attribute is set to true, the callback is invoked for all pages in a group if any page in the group is within the viewport.
注释信息: @param { SwiperContentAnimatedTransition } transition - custom content transition animation.
@returns { SwiperAttribute } the attribute of the swiper.

parameters.说明: custom content transition animation.

节点.功能描述:
Triggered when content in the Swiper component scrolls.

NOTE:
1. This API does not work when prevMargin and nextMargin are set in such a way that the Swiper frontend and backend display the same page during loop playback.
2. During page scrolling, the ContentDidScrollCallback callback is invoked for all pages in the viewport on a frame-by-frame basis.
3. When the swipeByGroup parameter of the displayCount** attribute is set to true, the callback is invoked for all pages in a group if any page in the group is within the viewport.

selectedIndex is the index value of the swiper content selected before animation start. index is the index value of the swiper content. position is the moving ratio of the swiper content from the start position of the swiper main axis. mainAxisLength is the swiper main axis length for calculating position.
注释信息: @returns { SwiperAttribute } the attribute of the swiper.

parameters.说明: callback of scroll,

the index value of the current child page.
the index value of the child page that will display.
the sliding offset of each frame. Positive numbers indicating slide backward(e.g. from index=1 to index=0), negative numbers indicating slide forward(e.g. from index=0 to index=1).
